title: KD Platform Dashboard: Internet Identity guard + admin add-user UI with React Query refetch

requirements.summary: Add an admin-only “Add user” form on the KD dashboard that calls the canister addUser method and refreshes Total Users.
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend: KD Dashboard shows an “Admin” section (only when the caller is an admin) with inputs for name and email and an “Add user” action.
After adding a user via the UI, the “Total Users” card updates (via React Query invalidation/refetch) and displays the new count.
Non-admin callers cannot add users (backend enforces authorization and frontend does not render the admin form).

file_operations.description: Add React Query hooks for KD admin UX: a query hook to read admin status (calling the existing backend capability isCallerAdmin()) and a mutation hook to add a user (calling the existing backend capability addUser(name, email)) that invalidates/refetches the ['totalUsers'] query on success. Also adjust useTotalUsers to support an optional enabled flag so the dashboard can avoid querying when not signed in. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create a KD dashboard Admin UI card that renders name/email inputs and an “Add user” button, using shadcn-ui components (Card, Button, Input, Label, Alert) for consistent styling, and calling the new hooks to submit and show success/error states. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire the new AdminAddUserCard into the KD dashboard page: fetch admin status via the new hook and render the Admin section only when isCallerAdmin is true; ensure the add-user action triggers React Query invalidation so the Total Users card updates after a successful add. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Guard the KD dashboard with an Internet Identity sign-in prompt and show friendly English messaging on unauthorized access.
acceptanceCriteria: If the user is not authenticated/authorized to call `getTotalUsers()`, the KD dashboard displays a friendly sign-in prompt in English instead of a generic error.
After signing in, the dashboard loads and displays the live total user count.
No changes are made to immutable hook files (Internet Identity hooks remain unmodified).

file_operations.description: Add an Internet Identity guard to the KD dashboard: use the existing useInternetIdentity hook (without modifying it) to detect authentication state; when not authenticated, render a clear English sign-in prompt with a Login button (calling login) instead of querying protected dashboard data. When authenticated, load total users; if the backend call fails due to authorization (e.g., trap message indicating unauthorized), replace the generic error UI with the same friendly sign-in/authorization message. Use the authorization component guidance to present an AccessDenied-style experience for unauthorized callers, and use shadcn-ui components (Button/Alert/Card) for consistent UI. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Ensure the Total Users query can be disabled until the user is authenticated (and/or until the dashboard guard allows protected data fetching) to prevent avoidable unauthorized errors. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
